name: Puffs (Gluten-free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients: mix together 1 cup of defatted soy flour and 1 cup of brown rice flour. Add 2 teaspoons of baking powder.
2. Add the wet ingredients: stir in 2 teaspoons of honey and 1 tablespoon of applesauce with the dry mixture until well combined.
3. Gradually add water: slowly incorporate 1/3 cup of water into the mixture, ensuring a smooth consistency.
4. Prepare for baking: lightly grease or cover a baking sheet with non-stick coating.
5. Shape the batter: scoop spoonfuls of the batter onto the prepared baking sheet.
6. Bake until golden: place the sheet in an oven preheated to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the puffs are browned on the edges.
